Thanks i hv alresdy stopped. No point trying to wake up people who hv closed there eyes purposely. I tried to give reason to them in all possible ways but as I said some people are fulfilling their political ambitions out of this and do not want sane voices to prevail. Let them enjoy their glory. It would be better to refrain from posting any further comments or reply bcoz they are blindfolded & will not understand & things may turn ugly
It would be better to refrain from posting any further comments or reply bcoz they are blindfolded & will not understand & things may turn ugly

Good evening....

I was out today as first day of week is always hectic for me, so a while ago i saw the comments of the members of School protest group...
They have totally failed to understand the comment made by me at the inception....when people there are complaining about the fee charged by certain school when the child was in nursery & now in Standard 9, then there is no point to reply...not even a single word...its the failure of the admin of that group bcoz people have deviated from the very purpose of that protest group....
After going through couple of dozen comments ,what i feel is that they are challenging / protesting against  the entire Institution of education , the way they are running there schools, there business model, there structure ( which obviously includes fees) rather than seeking relief in the covid period....

There focus have shifted from the very purpose of the protest & somewhere down the line i feel either Ruia ji is misguiding them or they by themselves are misguided....well personally i will never want them to get defeated, provided their protest are bona fide 

They are entitled for relief ( in terms of relaxation of fees etc) for a certain period due to pandemic , but one cannot seek waiver/ relief etc for lifetime or claim anything which was pre-pandemic....

But by going through the cluster of those comments , intentions seems to be different & may God forbid , if things dont turn up the way they are expecting, it will be Ruia ji who will be blamed at last..


Well i joined that group at the inception bcoz i was approached by one of my colleague who happens to be a friend of Ruia ji for Certification of income of the protesting parents for Court purpose on a pro bono basis, to which i was agreed by my heart & soul....but i am leaving the group bcoz there is no point to remain there bcoz people have resorted to personal attack rather than debating on the merit.....

I would thank you from the bottom of my heart for spending ur precious time by replying & making people understand the things...but there seems to be some vested interest among some lawyers who are protesting bcoz sometime ago i got to learn from my acquaintances who are quite close to those lawyers that fair amount of deal in terms of negotiations/ brokerages were going, in & between the School authorities & the lawyers representing the protesting the parents......
Tone of Mr Ruia affirms such things & it may not be ruled out....

Well thank you Pawan ji ðð
